name: ❤ Romance ❤ kpdh
description:

Creator note:

Hi! I'd like to ask for ideas on bots! I've been flopping lately, getting little amount of views- but this is my plan to fix that! If you can, pls go to my request bot and put ur ideas in. It really takes time out of my bordem before school starts. If I don't respond to request days after August 5th, I didn't forget about u! I'm just busy! Enjoy, ♡ and thank you for hearing what I said :3
